title: Moras
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Moras''' were a faction that imprisoned [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] and forced him to serve in the [[Mora Infantry]].

==Behind the scenes==
The Moras are referenced in [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]. The book fails to note whether the Moras are a species, a government, or something else altogether.

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-08-07 -->[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]
